snippet: @DenisValerievichMayorov, a personal access token was created on your account. Hey DenisValerievichMayorov! A fine-grained personal access token (GeminiWeatherAction) was recently added to your account
subject: [GitHub] A fine-grained personal access token has been added to your account
body:
Hey DenisValerievichMayorov!

A fine-grained personal access token (GeminiWeatherAction) was recently added to your account. Visit https://github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens/12647756 for more information.
To see this and other security events for your account, visit https://github.com/settings/security-log

If you run into problems, please contact support by visiting https://github.com/contact

Thanks,
The GitHub Team
